# Arcadia Controls

> Premium Blazor UI components for enterprise .NET developers. Charts, forms, dashboards, and notifications — native SVG rendering with zero JavaScript dependencies.

## Overview

Arcadia Controls is a commercial Blazor component library that provides:
- 8 chart types (Line, Bar, Pie, Scatter, Radar, Gauge, Heatmap, Candlestick)
- 7 dashboard widgets (KPI Card, Sparkline, Delta Indicator, Progress Bar, Bar List, Tracker, Category Bar)
- 21-field Form Builder with schema-driven and model-driven rendering
- Toast notification system
- Theme engine with design tokens, light/dark modes, and Tailwind CSS plugin

## Technical Details

- Rendering: Native Blazor SVG — zero JavaScript for core chart rendering
- Frameworks: .NET 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10
- Render Modes: Blazor Server, WebAssembly, Auto, Static SSR
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant with hidden data tables for screen readers
- Testing: 555+ unit tests
- License: Community Edition is MIT (free), Pro and Enterprise are commercial

## Installation

```
dotnet add package Arcadia.Charts
dotnet add package Arcadia.FormBuilder
dotnet add package Arcadia.Theme
dotnet add package Arcadia.Notifications
```

## Pricing

- Community: Free forever (MIT). Core, Theme, 4 chart types, Sparkline, Notifications.
- Pro: $299/developer/year. All 8 chart types, 7 dashboard widgets, Form Builder, animations, email support.
- Enterprise: $799/developer/year. Everything in Pro plus custom feature requests, private roadmap access, priority bug fixes, early access, dedicated support.

- Documentation: https://arcadiaui.com/docs
